title: corynostylis diandra
intro: Corynostylis diandra, also known as the two-horned corynostylis, is a plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which contain various bioactive compounds. These compounds have been found to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. Corynostylis diandra can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it has been used in herbal medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
